data.html_notes:
Description Receive type transactions are not displayed in the transaction list. It appears across different transaction networks. After performing transactions, only Sent transactions are shown, while Received transactions are missing. Observed transactions were performed between the following accounts:
  • ggaphrindashvili / 123qweASD! / peanut stone buzz popular rookie air relief wedding volume clog want key
  • gwallet126 / 123qweASD! / eternal feature bus rich select penalty wrist finish wonder divorce inmate certain
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Perform transactions on any supported network
  2. Open the Transactions page
  3. Observe displayed transaction types
Expected Result
  • Received transactions should appear in the transaction list
  • Transaction history should show both Sent and Received records when applicable
  • Transaction list should be complete across all networks
Actual Result
  • Only Sent transactions are displayed
  • Received transactions are missing
  • Issue appears across multiple/all networks
Device: iPhone 14 pro IOS 26.5 / Pixel 7 v16 Version: v2.3 (654) / (742)
data.name: [Transactions] Receive transactions are missing from transaction list
data.notes:
Description 
Receive type transactions are not displayed in the transaction list.
 
It appears across different transaction networks. After performing transactions, only Sent transactions are shown, while Received transactions are missing.

Observed transactions were performed between the following accounts:
    ggaphrindashvili / 123qweASD! / peanut stone buzz popular rookie air relief wedding volume clog want key
    gwallet126 / 123qweASD! / eternal feature bus rich select penalty wrist finish wonder divorce inmate certain

Steps to Reproduce 
    Perform transactions on any supported network
    Open the Transactions page
    Observe displayed transaction types

 Expected Result 
    Received transactions should appear in the transaction list
    Transaction history should show both Sent and Received records when applicable
    Transaction list should be complete across all networks

 Actual Result 
    Only Sent transactions are displayed
    Received transactions are missing
    Issue appears across multiple/all networks

Device: iPhone 14 pro IOS 26.5 / Pixel 7 v16
Version: v2.3 (654) / (742)
